headline: Swedish transhumanist Nick Bostrom fears a 'pendulum swinging too far' against AI
description: The futurologist warns of the threat artificial intelligence poses to white-collar workers and the unprecedented existential crisis it could spark among the public, while also acknowledging its contributions to research and health care.

headline: Why dropping the worst-case climate scenario does not undermine the reality of global warming

Gunman killed by US Secret Service after opening fire near White House
description: President Donald Trump was inside the White House on Saturday evening when a gunman approached the building's west side and began firing. Secret Service Police returned fire, striking a bystander as well as the suspect, who was later pronounced deceased.

headline: Cannes Film Festival: Cristian Mungiu wins Palme d'Or for 'Fjord' at closing ceremony overshadowed by the state of the world
description: On May 23, the jury, chaired by South Korean filmmaker Park Chan-wook, awarded the Romanian director with the Palme d'Or for the second time, and presented its Grand Prix to 'Minotaur' by the Russian director Andrey Zvyagintsev.

headline: French Open starts amid a heat wave in Paris
description: The night match of Roland Garros features three-time champion Novak Djokovic against French tennis player Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard.

headline: European activists recount Gaza Flotilla violence: 'They told us they were going to kill us'
description: Members of the Gaza Flotilla describe an escalation of violence during the interception of their vessels by Israeli forces.

Tamil cinema superstar Vijay makes spectacular political debut in India
description: Actor Joseph Vijay Chandrasekhar has stunned the country by winning regional elections in Tamil Nadu. The 51-year-old relied on his millions of fans and campaigned on a platform of change.

headline: What are the risks of the Ebola virus spreading beyond the DRC?
description: Estimating the true scale of the outbreak, as well as the risk of the virus spreading both within the region and beyond, has challenged researchers, who face an epidemic with many unknowns.

headline: New Ebola outbreak in the DR Congo puts international solidarity to the test
description: Six years after the Covid-19 pandemic, the response to large-scale health crises is being undermined by the collapse of international aid.
